daily.today_energy: Your magnetic energy is running hot today, Leo. The cosmos is basically telling you to trust your gut and let your natural confidence shine. People are gravitating toward your vibe—use it wisely.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, your emotional frequency is tuned to authenticity right now. If you've been holding back something real, today feels like the universe giving you a gentle nudge to speak up.
daily.career: Creative momentum is building, and your ideas have serious potential. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. The energy supports bold moves and stepping into your power.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and celebration today. Whether it's dancing, walking, or just shaking things out—listen to that urge. Mental clarity comes when you get your physical energy flowing.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to step into your power without the theatrics. Venus is nudging you toward authentic connections, while Mercury's dance suggests clarity on something you've been overthinking. Trust the vibe shift.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is about quality over quantity in your connections. Someone might show up differently than expected—be open to rewriting the narrative. Your energy is magnetic right now, so lead with honesty.
weekly.career: The universe is rewarding your recent efforts with momentum. This isn't the time to play small or wait for permission. A conversation or opportunity could shift things forward. Your confidence is your currency this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. This week brings clarity on what actually serves your energy versus what drains it. Listen closely—your intuition about your wellbeing is spot on.
